questionHtml:
A mass of 0.25 kg hangs from a spring of spring constant 4.0 N m−1.

What is the natural frequency of oscillation for this system?


A.  0.50 Hz

B.  0.64 Hz

C.  1.6 Hz

D.  2.0 Hz

meta.title: A mass of 0.25 kg hangs from a spring of spring constant 4.0 N m−1. What is the natural frequency of oscillation for this system? A. 0.50 Hz B. 0.64 Hz C. 1.6 Hz D. 2.0 Hz
